data: Harder entertainment trivia for film, music, TV, awards, and franchise fans.
Which film won the first Academy Award for Best Animated Feature?
The category was first awarded for films released in 2001.
'Shrek' won the first Oscar for Best Animated Feature. For further study, review Academy Award category history.
Which artist's real name was Prince Rogers Nelson?
His stage name was also his given first name.
Prince was born Prince Rogers Nelson. For further study, explore the Minneapolis sound and Prince's discography.
'The Empire Strikes Back' was released before 'Return of the Jedi.'
The original trilogy's middle chapter came out in 1980.
'The Empire Strikes Back' was released in 1980, before 'Return of the Jedi' in 1983. For further study, review Star Wars release order versus story chronology.
The fictional coffee shop in 'Friends' is Central _____.
The name is a coffee pun.
The coffee shop is Central Perk. For further study, compare recurring sitcom locations and how they anchor ensemble shows.
Which director made both 'Jaws' and 'E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial'?
He is also associated with Indiana Jones.
Steven Spielberg directed both 'Jaws' and 'E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.' For further study, trace Spielberg's blockbuster influence.
Which novel introduced the character Katniss Everdeen?
Katniss Everdeen is the protagonist of 'The Hunger Games.' For further study, review 2000s young adult dystopian fiction.
Which band released the album 'OK Computer'?
The band is also known for 'Paranoid Android.'
Radiohead released 'OK Computer' in 1997. For further study, explore 1990s alternative rock landmarks.
The character Gollum appears in 'The Lord of the Rings.'
He is obsessed with the One Ring.
Gollum is a major character in J.R.R. Tolkien's Middle-earth stories. For further study, review the role of the One Ring across the trilogy.
Which actor played Jack Dawson in 'Titanic'?
He later won an Oscar for 'The Revenant.'
Leonardo DiCaprio played Jack Dawson in 'Titanic.' For further study, compare late-1990s blockbuster star turns.
Which TV series includes the fictional continent of Westeros?
It is based on George R.R. Martin's fantasy novels.
Westeros is a major setting in 'Game of Thrones.' For further study, review fantasy worldbuilding in television adaptations.
The fictional African nation in 'Black Panther' is _____.
It is technologically advanced and rich in vibranium.
Wakanda is the fictional home of Black Panther. For further study, explore how superhero settings shape character identity.
Which musical features the song 'My Shot'?
'My Shot' is from the musical 'Hamilton.' For further study, review modern Broadway cast albums and historical musicals.
